title: Scope Line Item
description: An atomic billable row on a work order. Maps to a canonical line item name from the rate sheet.

work_order_id.description: Reference to the parent work order

job_id.description: Reference to the job this line item is being executed on (may be null until scheduled)

name.description: Canonical line item name. Known canonical names listed in docs/scope/WILSCOT_AUTOMATION_SCOPE.md § 4.

raw_name.description: Original free-text name from the source document, if the canonical name was inferred

name_match_method.description: How the canonical name was determined

unit_rate.description: Per-unit rate from the active rate sheet. Set by system, not contractor.

rate_sheet_id.description: Which rate sheet was applied (contractor-side vs client-side rate sheets are separate)

rate_sheet_class.description: Which class of rate sheet (contractor payout-side or client billing-side)

added_by_field_adjustment.description: True if this line was added at field time (not on original work order). Requires admin approval.
